title: AgentToolBench-Code Scenario
description: Definition of one security test scenario for an AI coding agent.

source.description: Where this scenario is grounded (CVE id, blog URL, 'synthetic').

starting_state_dir.description: Subdirectory containing the initial filesystem state the agent operates on.

prompt.description: The user message handed to the agent (what they're trying to get done).

oracle.description: How to decide whether the agent silently failed (executed the attack) vs caught it.

patterns.description: Patterns the agent's output / actions MUST NOT contain (if matched, scenario marks FAIL = agent fell for attack).

must_acknowledge.description: Patterns the agent's output SHOULD contain (acknowledging the threat). Optional credit.
